hero.headline: Smart Farming Made Simple
hero.subtext: Get personalized crop recommendations and market insights.

crops.name: Crop Guide
crops.desc: Get expert guidance on which crops to plant based on your location, soil type, and season.

weather.name: Weather Intelligence
weather.desc: Stay updated with accurate weather forecasts tailored to your farming location.

market.name: Market Prices
market.desc: Monitor real-time market prices and get the best time to sell your produce.

soil.name: Soil Analysis
soil.desc: Understand your soil composition and get recommendations for soil improvement.

security.name: Secure & Private
security.desc: Your farm data is encrypted and kept secure. Only you control your information.

languages.name: Multiple Languages
languages.desc: Access Fahamu Shamba in English, Swahili, or Dholuo—your choice.

steps.title: Sign Up
steps.desc: Create your account and tell us about your farm. It only takes 2 minutes.

steps.title: Get Recommendations
steps.desc: Our AI analyzes your location, soil, and season to recommend the best crops.

steps.title: Track & Grow
steps.desc: Monitor weather, market prices, and crop health with our integrated dashboard.

steps.title: Harvest Success
steps.desc: Maximize your yield and profits with data-driven farming decisions.

james.name: James Kiplagat
james.text: Fahamu Shamba helped me understand when to plant and what crops work best for my soil. My harvest doubled!

mary.name: Mary Omondi
mary.text: The market price predictions saved me from selling at the wrong time. I earned 40% more this season.

peter.name: Peter Mwangi
peter.text: Using Fahamu Shamba, I've reduced my farming costs by half while increasing productivity. Highly recommend!

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Farm?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Kenyan farmers already using Fahamu Shamba to grow smarter, not harder.

instructions.title: How to Get Started
instructions.subtitle: Choose what applies to you:
instructions.new: 1. New to Fahamu Shamba? Click Sign Up to create your account.
instructions.existing: 2. Already registered? Click Login to enter your dashboard.
instructions.first: 3. Want to learn more? Scroll up to see what Fahamu Shamba can help you with.
instructions.after: Next: Once you log in, you'll see your dashboard with crop tips, weather updates, and market prices.

footer.description: Fahamu Shamba is an AI-powered platform helping Kenyan farmers make smarter decisions about what to plant, when to plant, and how to maximize their yields.
